# edgenext_cdn_domain_config (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain to query configuration for

### Optional

- `config_item` (List of String) Configuration items

### Read-Only

- `area` (String) Acceleration area: mainland_china (mainland China), outside_mainland_china (outside mainland China), global (global)
- `cname` (String) CNAME
- `config` (List of Object) Configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `create_time` (String) Creation time
- `https` (Number) HTTPS
- `icp_num` (String) ICP filing number
- `icp_status` (String) ICP filing status
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Domain status
- `type` (String) Domain type: page (web page), download (download), video_demand (video on demand), dynamic (dynamic)
- `update_time` (String) Update time
